headline: Costco members may be overlooking this valuable feature
summary: Memberships drive Costco's business. “The most important item we sell is the membership card,” Costco CEO Ron Vachris told Fortune. Costco also makes much of its profit from selling memberships, since it sells most of its merchandise at very low margins. Members “keep coming back because they know ...
